src/ui/molecules/StoryCard.svelte.format_timestamp: Formats a given timestamp into a standard Swedish/ISO-adjacent 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm' string.

src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.toggle_mute: Toggles the global audio mute state, preserving previous volume if unmuting.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.log_action: Logs a control panel action to the application's system log.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.load_story: Loads a specific story by ID, sets it as active, syncs runtime, refreshes the log, and switches to storymode view.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.run_mock: Simulates a mock turn by either a fractal or AI character, generating content and logging it as a system turn.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.hard_reset: Performs a complete hard reset by deleting the database and reloading the application window.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.refresh_stories: Asynchronously fetches and updates the local cache of available stories.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.adjust_height: Dynamically adjusts the height of the textarea to fit its content.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.handle_send: Handles sending user input, trimming whitespace, clearing the input, and passing it to the Chrono engine.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.handle_keydown: Captures keyboard events to send messages on Enter (without Shift) and prevent default form submission.
src/ui/molecules/UnifiedConsole.svelte.handle_window_keydown: Captures window keyboard events to close the control panel on 'Escape'.

src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.svelte.hex_hue: Calculates the HSL hue (0-360) for a given hexadecimal color string, returning 361 for achromatic colors.
src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.svelte.sync_modifiers: Ensures the character's `modifiers` object and its required fields are properly initialized.
src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.svelte.handle_creative_action: Triggers AI enhancement for the active prompt field or extracts optics metadata if no prompt text is present.
src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.svelte.handle_generate: Initiates AI image generation based on the current prompt or opens an upload dialog if no prompt text exists.
src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.svelte.handle_upload_portrait: Handles manual image upload via a Perchance plugin and updates the character's profile picture.
src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.svelte.prevent_default: Prevents the default event behavior to maintain active focus states.

src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.test.js.ensureModifiers: Initializes or updates a character's modifiers object, ensuring all required fields are present with default values.
src/ui/molecules/VisualWing.test.js.handleCreativeAction: Simulates the logic for handling creative actions, such as enhancing a prompt or composing a base prompt.

src/ui/motion/engine.svelte.js.spring: Creates and returns a new `KineticSpring` instance, a Svelte 5 rune-compatible spring physics wrapper.

src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.get_target: Helper function to find the appropriate animation target element within a node.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.createKineticAction: A standardized manager for registering hover-triggered physical animations, synchronizing with global motion intensity and reduced motion preferences.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.shimmy: A Svelte action that applies a nervous, high-frequency jitter (rotation + translation) animation to an element on hover.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.pulse: A Svelte action that applies a looping 'Heartbeat' thump animation to an element on hover, with a return animation on mouse leave.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.spin: A Svelte action that applies a 90-degree rotation animation to an element, powered by spring physics.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.roll: A Svelte action that applies a full 360-degree rotation animation to an element, powered by spring physics.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.stab: A Svelte action that applies a quick horizontal thrust animation to an element on hover.
src/ui/motion/kinetic.svelte.js.kinetic_scroll: A Svelte action that enables drag-to-scroll functionality with momentum for an element.

src/ui/motion/Typewriter.svelte.normalize: Normalizes text by stripping HTML tags, markdown formatting, and collapsing whitespace to detect clean content appends.

src/ui/motion/typewriter.svelte.js.typewriter: A Svelte action that safely types out sanitized HTML character-by-character within a target element, preserving HTML tags and truncating text nodes reactively.

src/ui/organisms/CardHand.svelte.is_disabled: Determines if an entity card should be disabled due to identity allocation collisions across synchronized role slots.
src/ui/organisms/CardHand.svelte.handle_create_new: Generates a pristine entity instance template via the Factory, upserts it to storage, selects it, and opens its profile.
src/ui/organisms/CardHand.svelte.handle_select: Selects an entity for the current card hand type and closes the card hand overlay.
src/ui/organisms/CardHand.svelte.handle_keydown: Closes the card hand overlay if the 'Escape' key is pressed while it's open.

src/ui/organisms/Profile.svelte.handle_click_outside: Handles click events outside the profile modal to check for unsaved changes or close the profile.

src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.sync: Synchronizes the character state when the application-level editing entity changes.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.get_safe_value: Safely retrieves a value from the `char` object using a dot-string path, returning an empty string if not found.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.set_field_value: Sets a value in the `char` object at a specified dot-string path and marks the profile as user-mutated.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.handle_close: Toggles editing mode or closes the profile, prompting for unsaved changes if necessary.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.cancel: Reverts all changes, exits editing mode, reloads the character from the original entity, and resets interaction tracking.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.set_active_field: Sets the currently active field context for interaction tracking.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.reset_active_field: Resets the active field context to its default state.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.save: Commits the current entity changes to the repository, updates global entity lists, and exits editing mode.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.delete: Deletes the current entity from the repository and closes the profile.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.enhance: Triggers an AI-enhanced text generation for a specific field if it has a value and is not already busy.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.enhance_field_inner: Executes the internal text enhancement mechanics for a specific field using an LLM service.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.enhance_profile: Triggers AI-enhanced text generation for the entire profile, populating multiple fields simultaneously.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.add_vector_item: Adds a new, initialized item to a specified vector array within the character's data.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.patch_vector_item: Applies a partial update (patch) to a specific item within a vector array.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.remove_vector_item: Removes an item at a given index from a specified vector array.
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.update_vector_weight: Adjusts the emotional weight of a specific vector item within a defined range (1-10).
src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.setImage: Sets the character's profile picture and triggers immediate persistence to the database and runtime state.

src/ui/organisms/ProfileArray.svelte.update_tags: Parses a raw comma-separated string into an array of tags and patches the vector item with these tags.

src/ui/organisms/ProfileHeader.svelte.formatName: Formats a raw name string, specifically making three-word names 'bottom-heavy' by inserting a newline for better visual balance.

src/ui/organisms/Storyboard.svelte.Slot: A Svelte snippet that renders either a Skeleton loader or an EntityCard for AI, User, or Fractal slots.

src/ui/organisms/StoryboardDynamicTitle..get_color: Retrieves the signature color for a given entity.
src/ui/organisms/StoryboardDynamicTitle..handle_input: Updates the custom_title state and sets `is_custom` to true based on user input in the contenteditable title.
src/ui/organisms/StoryboardDynamicTitle..handle_reset: Resets the title to its dynamically generated state and triggers a re-roll.

src/ui/organisms/StorymodeFeed.svelte.map_role: Maps database roles ('assistant', 'ai', 'prologue') to simplified UI sender archetypes ('ai', 'fractal', or original role).
src/ui/organisms/StorymodeFeed.svelte.handle_delete: Initiates the deletion confirmation process for a specific story log entry.
src/ui/organisms/StorymodeFeed.svelte.execute_delete: Executes the permanent deletion of a story log entry from the database via Chrono engine.
src/ui/organisms/StorymodeFeed.svelte.handle_edit: Activates the editing state for a designated stream log index.
src/ui/organisms/StorymodeFeed.svelte.handle_save_edit: Persists client-side text modifications for a log entry to the database via Chrono engine.

src/ui/utils/field-path.js.get_value: Retrieves a value from a nested JavaScript object using a dot-string path.
src/ui/utils/field-path.js.set_value: Sets a value within a nested JavaScript object using a dot-string path, mutating the object.

src/ui/utils/markdown.js.parse_markdown: Safely parses basic markdown (strong, emphasis, strong-emphasis, quote) from text into an array of paragraph blocks, each containing an array of inline tokens.

src/ui/motion/engine.svelte.js.KineticSpring: A native Svelte 5 class that implements a spring physics controller, managing an animated value with stiffness, damping, and precision.

src/ui/organisms/profile.svelte.js.ProfileState: A Svelte 5 reactive class responsible for controlling the viewing, editing, saving, and deletion logic for entity profiles, integrating with application state and AI services.
